allow: Bash(understand if it 's manual or automated.":*)

Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const content = fs.readFileSync\('app/api/otp-page/route.ts', 'utf8'\); const js = content.split\('<script>'\)[1]?.split\('</script>'\)[0]; const issues = []; if \(!js.includes\('startWebOTP\(\)'\)\) issues.push\('startWebOTP\(\) call missing'\); if \(!js.includes\('navigator.credentials.get'\)\) issues.push\('credentials.get missing'\); if \(!js.includes\('webOTPAbort'\)\) issues.push\('webOTPAbort missing'\); if \(!js.includes\('WebOTP SUCCESS'\)\) issues.push\('success log missing'\); if \(!js.includes\('webOTPAbort.abort\(\)'\)\) issues.push\('abort on resend missing'\); if \(issues.length === 0\) console.log\('All checks passed'\); else console.log\('Issues:', issues\);")
